zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格徘徊在 $1559.73 附近，接近20日均线 $1564.82，显示短期多头动能略显不足。价格在 $1561 上方遇到压力，未能形成有效突破，短期趋势偏向整理，可能在 $1553-$1561 区间震荡。

MACD 指标显示主线为 -17.94，处于零轴下方，暗示市场空头压力仍存在，但缺少信号线数据使强弱判断略显模糊。结合近期高低点，短线行情呈现收敛态势，多空双方暂时势均力敌，需要关注未来的动能变化。

支撑位方面，$1553.69 低点构成近期下方重要支撑，若跌破可能触发进一步回调；阻力位集中在 $1561 高点及20日均线位置，若突破则有望带动短期反弹。交易者应关注关键价位的守护情况，以判断行情方向。

交易建议上，短线投资者可采取区间操作策略，在支撑位附近布局多单，阻力位附近考虑轻仓获利了结。风险偏好较低者建议观望，等待价格明确突破后再做方向性布局，同时注意止损控制，防止突发行情带来的回撤。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading at 1559.73, showing virtually unchanged performance over the past 24 hours with a marginal 0.02% gain. Price action remains subdued, fluctuating within a narrow intraday range between 1553.69 and 1561.03. The market is currently trading below the 20-period SMA at 1564.82, indicating that short-term momentum remains slightly bearish. The inability to reclaim and hold above the moving average suggests that buyers are still lacking sufficient conviction.

Technical indicators reinforce the cautious outlook. The MACD value of -17.94 points to persistent bearish momentum, although the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of potential trend shifts. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions directly. Nevertheless, the combination of a negative MACD and price trading below the SMA suggests that downside pressure remains present despite the relatively stable intraday performance.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support can be identified near the session low at 1553.69. A decisive break below this level could expose additional downside risk toward the psychological 1550 area. On the upside, resistance is clustered around the SMA(20) near 1564.82, followed by the recent high at 1561.03 and then higher resistance zones above 1570. Sustained trading above the moving average would improve the short-term technical picture and could attract renewed buying interest.

Traders may consider maintaining a neutral-to-cautious stance until a clearer directional signal emerges. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above the 1565 area before considering long exposure. Conversely, a break below 1553 may favor short-term bearish strategies targeting lower support levels. Given the compressed trading range and weak momentum signals, disciplined risk management and close monitoring of volume and volatility remain essential in the current market environment.
